Package com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.collections.list

Class ReadOnlyListProperty<E>

java.lang.Object
com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.collections.list.ReadOnlyListProperty<E>
All Implemented Interfaces:
ObservableList<E>, ObservableListValue<E>, Observable, ObservableValue<ObservableList<E>>, Property<ObservableList<E>>, ReadOnlyProperty<ObservableList<E>>, ObservableObjectValue<ObservableList<E>>, Iterable<E>, Collection<E>, List<E>, SequencedCollection<E>
Direct Known Subclasses:
ListProperty
public class ReadOnlyListProperty<E> extends Object implements ReadOnlyProperty<ObservableList<E>>, ObservableListValue<E>
